Kingsman: The Golden Circle (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $100,234,838Details
International Box Office $308,568,858
Worldwide Box Office $408,803,696
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $7,235,722
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $14,349,714
Total $21,585,436
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When our heroes’ headquarters are destroyed and the world is held hostage, their journey leads them to the discovery of an allied spy organization in the US called Statesman, dating back to the day they were both founded. The two elite secret organizations band together to defeat a ruthless common enemy, in order to save the world, something that’s becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy…

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$39,023,010 (38.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.57 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:24.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$104,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,003 opening theaters/4,038 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $133,646,291

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 22nd, 2017 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: September 19th, 2017 (Wide) (South Korea)
September 21st, 2017 (Wide) (Germany)
September 21st, 2017 (Wide), released as Kingsman - Il cerchio d'oro (Italy)
September 22nd, 2017 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
September 22nd, 2017 (Wide) (Poland)
Video Release: November 28th, 2017 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of strong violence, drug content, language throughout and some sexual material.
(Rating bulletin 2490 (Cert #50974), 8/23/2017)
Running Time: 141 minutes
Franchise: Kingsman
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fictionalized Version of Yourself, Intertitle
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Secret Agent, Shadowy Organization
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, MARV Films
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When our heroes’ headquarters are destroyed and the world is held hostage, their journey leads them to the discovery of an allied spy organization in the US called Statesman, dating back to the day they were both founded. The two elite secret organizations band together to defeat a ruthless common enemy, in order to save the world, something that’s becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy…
